recentPapers.title: Offline Reinforcement Learning: Leveraging Learned Representations
recentPapers.abstract: Methods for effective offline reinforcement learning using learned representations from offline data.

recentPapers.title: Preference-Based Reinforcement Learning
recentPapers.abstract: Learning robot behaviors from human preferences rather than explicit reward functions.

recentPapers.title: Language Models as Zero-Shot Planners for Embodied Agents
recentPapers.abstract: Using large language models to enable zero-shot planning for robotic tasks through language understanding.

recentPapers.title: Vision Transformers for Dense Prediction
recentPapers.abstract: Extending vision transformers to dense prediction tasks like segmentation and depth estimation.

recentPapers.title: Self-Supervised Learning in Vision
recentPapers.abstract: Recent advances in self-supervised learning for vision using contrastive and masked modeling approaches.

recentPapers.title: Efficient Transfer Learning for Computer Vision
recentPapers.abstract: Practical techniques for efficient transfer learning and domain adaptation in vision models.

recentPapers.title: Principles of Foundation Models
recentPapers.abstract: Foundational principles for building and understanding large-scale pre-trained foundation models.

recentPapers.title: Algorithmic Game Theory and Machine Learning
recentPapers.abstract: Connections between algorithmic game theory and machine learning for multi-agent systems.

recentPapers.title: On the Computational Complexity of Machine Learning
recentPapers.abstract: Theoretical analysis of computational complexity in machine learning algorithms.

recentPapers.title: 3D Shape Understanding from Images
recentPapers.abstract: Methods for reconstructing and understanding 3D shapes from 2D images using modern deep learning.

recentPapers.title: Contrastive Learning for 3D Vision
recentPapers.abstract: Self-supervised and contrastive learning methods for 3D vision tasks and representations.

recentPapers.title: Holistic Understanding of Scenes
recentPapers.abstract: Methods for scene understanding combining object detection, segmentation, and spatial reasoning.
